title: Delhi HC asks DGCA to promptly decide complaint that Air India served only one hot meal during 16-hour flight
description: The Delhi High Court has directed the Directorate General of Civil Aviation (DGCA) and the Ministry of Civil Aviation to promptly decide a complaint against Air India over inadequate meals on a 16-hour flight [Nivedita Sharma Vs Ministry of Civil Aviation].The complaint was filed by two passengers. They said Air India served only one hot meal and limited snacks on its Delhi–San Francisco flight despite knowing that they had diabetes and hypertension.A Division Bench of Chief Justice Devendra Kum
